channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: High Fire Danger in Muskoka: Campfires Advised Against This Weekend
item.description: Residents and visitors in the Muskoka and surrounding areas are being warned to exercise extreme caution this weekend due to a high fire danger rating. The current weather conditions, including warm t...

item.title: Marcos denies targeting Senate majority, says cases stem from flood control probe findings
item.description: President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. has denied allegations that his administration is specifically targeting the current 13-member Senate majority bloc through legal cases filed against some sen...

item.title: Invasive plant pest found in grapevines sold at Costco prompts agricultural warning in California
item.description: Agricultural authorities in Northern California have issued an urgent warning after an invasive insect, the glassy-winged sharpshooter, was discovered on grapevines and citrus plants sold at Costco st...

item.title: Blitzboks remain unbeaten in Valladolid Sevens after two hard-fought victories
item.description: The Blitzboks have secured their spot in the quarter-finals of the Valladolid Sevens in Spain following two tough victories on the opening day of the tournament. In Pool A, South Africa faced stern ch...

item.title: Senate Blue Ribbon Committee to resume flood control scam hearings on June 4 under subcommittee setup
item.description: The Philippine Senate is set to resume its investigation into the alleged flood control scam on June 4, 2026, according to Senate President Alan Peter Cayetano. He announced that a subcommittee under ...

item.title: Tanzania Ministry and MPs Debate Comprehensive Reforms to Address Ongoing Land Disputes
item.description: Tanzania’s Ministry of Lands has presented a set of strategies aimed at reducing long-standing land disputes across the country, sparking detailed debate in Parliament. The proposals focus on improvin...

item.title: Debate continues over proposed natural gas power plant in Tantramar, New Brunswick
item.description: A proposed natural gas power plant in Tantramar, New Brunswick, is generating mixed reactions among residents, officials, and stakeholders. Supporters argue the project could provide economic benefits...

item.title: Valve raises Steam Deck prices significantly amid ongoing hardware costs
item.description: Valve has announced a substantial price increase for its popular handheld gaming device, the Steam Deck, marking one of the most significant hikes in recent memory. The 512GB OLED model will now cost ...

item.title: Solomon Islands PM Matthew Wale to hold talks in Australia focusing on economic development and security
item.description: Matthew Wale, the newly elected Prime Minister of the Solomon Islands, will make his first official international visit to Australia. Wale assumed office in May following a no-confidence vote against ...

item.title: Abia State to Complete Umunnato Specialist Hospital Within One Year, Says Gov Otti
item.description: Governor Alex Otti of Abia State don give assurance say the new Abia State Specialist Hospital for Umunnato Alayi go ready quick-quick. During di foundation laying ceremony for di 100-bed hospital wey...

item.title: Significant rise in digital and financial inclusion among Indian women, NFHS survey shows
item.description: According to the sixth National Family Health Survey (NFHS-6), there has been a substantial improvement in digital access and related indicators among Indian women between 2019–2021 and 2023–24. The p...

item.title: Winnipeg man arrested after taking three teenagers hostage during police standoff
item.description: On Friday, Winnipeg police were involved in a tense standoff in the St. James area after a man wanted on an outstanding warrant took three teenagers hostage inside a home on King Edward Street. Office...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns celebrate CAF Champions League triumph with trophy parade in Pretoria
item.description: The Mamelodi Sundowns capped their CAF Champions League victory with a public trophy parade in Pretoria, South Africa. The team, fresh from sealing a 2-1 aggregate win over AS FAR of Morocco in Rabat,...

item.title: Radley handbags and shifting UK consumer preferences in the affordable luxury market
item.description: The article discusses the changing fortunes of British handbag brand Radley, once popular for offering accessible luxury and widely recognised for its signature Scottie dog charm. According to the com...

item.title: Judge reopens Trump IRS settlement case amid fraud allegations over $1.776B fund
item.description: A federal judge has reopened a major legal case involving former President Donald Trump, just days after it had been closed, citing serious concerns about potential deception in a settlement tied to a...

item.title: Domeng Set to Intensify into Typhoon as It Approaches PH
item.description: Tropical Storm Domeng, currently in the Philippine Area of Responsibility, is projected to strengthen over the next 24 hours. PAGASA weather specialist Obet Badrina indicated that Domeng could reach s...

item.title: Alex Chinneck Creates Surreal Urban Sculptures for Dior Store Windows in New York and Beverly Hills
item.description: British sculptor Alex Chinneck has partnered with Dior to create a series of large-scale sculptural installations for the fashion house’s flagship stores in New York City and Beverly Hills. Known for ...

item.title: Gawad Kalinga founder Tony Meloto arrested in Bulacan on trafficking charges
item.description: According to ABS-CBN News, Tony Meloto, the founder of the social housing organization Gawad Kalinga, was arrested in Bulacan on charges related to qualified trafficking. The report, published on May ...

item.title: Journalist John Solomon reportedly considered for White House special government employee position
item.description: A report indicates that journalist John Solomon, known for his work on politically sensitive investigations involving the 2016 election and the Trump campaign, is being considered for a role within th...

item.title: Stella falls silent during conversation with Bea in 'The Alibi' Episode 53
